title: Japan exports beat forecasts with 4.2% growth in February, but shipments to China and U.S. slump
summary_full: Exports to China, Japan's largest trading partner, fell 10.9%,  while shipments to the U.S  dropped 8%.
summary_public: Exports to China, Japan's largest trading partner, fell 10.9%,  while shipments to the U.S  dropped 8%.
